name: Daily task board health
prompt: Pull Notion Tasks DB. Flag any task >7 days in "In progress" or "Pending". Surface stale tasks to Director Mon review.

name: Wednesday runbook review
prompt: For any process executed >3x in the last week (read shared-ledger.jsonl across all PP workspaces), check if a runbook exists in /references/runbooks/. If not, draft one.

name: Sunday operations digest
prompt: Weekly summary: tasks completed, runbooks added, contractor invoices processed, tooling issues. Append to weekly rollup.
